src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Configure OAuth2 login to use a custom GrantedAuthoritiesMapper to dynamically assign roles based on user attributes.
Implement logic to map OAuth2 user attributes to Spring Security roles (ROLE_ADMIN, ROLE_MEMBER) based on email domain and configuration.

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Inject a list of admin emails from application properties to determine administrative privileges.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.human_impl: @Value("${app.admin.emails}") private final List<String> adminEmails = new ArrayList<String>();

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Autowire UserRepository to allow checking user database records for admin status during authentication.
Create a helper method to check if an email corresponds to an admin via configuration or database record.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.human_impl: public boolean isAdmin(String email) { if (adminEmails.contains(email)) { return true; } Optional<User> u = userRepository.findByEmail(email); return u.isPresent() && u.get().isAdmin(); }

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Move the base path from the class level to the method level to align with new routing structure.
Change the return type from User entity to CurrentUser model to consolidate user information.
Replace custom SpEL security check with standard Spring Security role check.
Add googleSub field to store Google OAuth subject identifier.
Add pictureUrl field to store user profile image URL.
Add fullName field to store user's full name.
Add givenName field to store user's first name.
Add familyName field to store user's last name.
Add emailVerified field to track email verification status.
Add locale field to store user's locale preference.
Add hostedDomain field to store Google Workspace domain.
Add admin field to explicitly track admin status.
Remove isMember method that derived membership from email domain.
Rename abstract method 'get' to 'getUser' for clarity and consistency.
Add abstract method to retrieve the full CurrentUser object.
Add abstract method to retrieve user roles as GrantedAuthority collection.
